docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,017.76 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHOY FMLY TR A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-03-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
